failedAssertions.reason: Frontend form renders and validates correctly but backend POST /admin/users returns 500 for all payloads — persistent backend bug since Round 1.

Approve confirmation dialog sends { reason: '' } but backend POST /credit/limit-requests/{id}/approve requires non-blank reason (400: 'Validation failed: reason must not be blank'). Approve dialog needs a reason textarea like the reject dialog.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: No test users have MFA enabled in backend seed data — all users have mfaEnabled=false. Cannot test Disable MFA functionality.
No changelog entries exist in backend seed data. Page renders correct empty state. Blocked on test data.
Requires changelog entries to trigger WhatsNew banner. No seed data entries exist. Blocked on test data.
Backend GET /audit/business-events returns HTTP 500 ('Failed to write request'). Frontend handles gracefully with error UI and retry. Backend bug.
Backend GET /admin/tenant-runtime/metrics returns HTTP 404 (endpoint doesn't exist). Security Policy section renders correctly. Blocked on backend endpoint implementation.
